text: Reporter: The First Lady came out last week and said she had no links with Epstein. Trump: Who? Reporter: The First Lady. Trump: She had none. Reporter: Why did she say that? Trump: Because the fake news said she did. She had none. I think that’s been proven. It bothered her that the fake news was being fake news.
text_zh: 记者：第一夫人上周出来说她与爱泼斯坦没有任何联系。特朗普：谁？记者：第一夫人。特朗普：她没有任何联系。记者：她为什么要那么说？特朗普：因为假新闻说她有。她没有任何联系。我认为这一点已经得到证实。假新闻制造假新闻让她感到困扰。

text: Open Source Intel WATCH 🔴 President Trump: Iran has agreed to no nuclear weapons and will hand over the “nuclear dust.” “Very important is that Iran does not have a nuclear weapon and they’ve agreed to that! Iran’s agreed to that and they’ve agreed to it very powerfully.” “They’ve agreed to give us back the nuclear dust that’s way underground because of the attack we made with the B-2 bombers.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报观察 🔴 特朗普总统：伊朗已同意不拥有核武器，并将移交“核尘埃”。“非常重要的是，伊朗没有核武器，他们已经同意了这一点！伊朗同意了，而且他们非常有力地同意了。”“他们同意归还我们因B-2轰炸机袭击而埋在地下深处的核尘埃。” 推文

text: WarMonitor Authorities are investigating abuse allegations at a federally funded migrant children’s shelter, including beatings and a claim that a child was kept in a “red room” for four days and given only bread to eat. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044838865324646590/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 战争监测：当局正在调查一起联邦资助的移民儿童收容所的虐待指控，包括殴打行为，以及一名儿童被关在“红房间”四天且只给面包吃的指控。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044838865324646590/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ali Abdollahi, commander of Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central HQ: "If the enemy commits aggression, the armed forces of the Islamic Republic are fully prepared for a comprehensive defense. There is no doubt about our military readiness." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044838261827289402/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部指挥官阿里·阿卜杜拉希：“如果敌人进行侵略，伊斯兰共和国武装部队已为全面防御做好充分准备。我们的军事准备毫无疑问。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044838261827289402/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: I answered the call and agreed to a temporary ceasefire to allow talks. “Our terms are clear: Hezbollah must disarm, and any deal must deliver a durable peace negotiated from a position of strength.” Netanyahu on the ceasefire: “We now have a historic opening for a peace deal with Lebanon. The balance has shifted, and we’re beginning to receive calls from Lebanon to engage in direct talks.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044836839261872545/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：内塔尼亚胡：我响应了呼吁，同意临时停火以进行谈判。“我们的条件很明确：真主党必须解除武装，任何协议都必须实现从实力地位谈判达成的持久和平。”内塔尼亚胡谈停火：“我们现在有了一个与黎巴嫩达成和平协议的历史性契机。力量平衡已经改变，我们开始收到来自黎巴嫩的直接谈判请求。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044836839261872545/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: Gulf and European officials believe a comprehensive deal between the United States and Iran could take six months to finalize. There is growing pressure to extend the current ceasefire to allow time for negotiations to progress and avoid a return to conflict. Regional leaders are also urging the immediate reopening of the Strait of Hormuz to stabilise global energy flows, warning that prolonged disruption could trigger further spikes in oil prices and even contribute to a global food crisis if the situation continues. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 彭博社：海湾和欧洲官员认为，美国和伊朗之间的全面协议可能需要六个月才能最终敲定。目前要求延长现有停火协议的压力越来越大，以便为谈判取得进展争取时间，并避免冲突重演。地区领导人还敦促立即重新开放霍尔木兹海峡以稳定全球能源流动，并警告称，如果局势持续，长期中断可能会引发油价进一步飙升，甚至导致全球粮食危机。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 President Trump pressed Netanyahu to accept the immediate ceasefire while Bibi insisted Israeli ground forces remain in the new "security zone" in southern Lebanon, Kan News reports. ➡️ The ceasefire is expected to last longer than 10 days. ➡️ Israel also plans to allow humanitarian aid into southern Lebanon, with trucks from the Samaritan’s Purse organization scheduled to deliver supplies under IDF security to residents who stayed in the Christian villages of Rmaish, Debel, and Ain Ebel near Bint Jbeil. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 据Kan新闻报道，特朗普总统敦促内塔尼亚胡接受立即停火，而内塔尼亚胡坚持要求以色列地面部队留在黎巴嫩南部新的“安全区”。➡️ 预计停火将持续超过10天。➡️ 以色列还计划允许人道主义援助进入黎巴嫩南部，撒玛利亚救援会组织的卡车计划在以色列国防军的保护下，为留在宾特朱拜勒附近的Rmaish、Debel和Ain Ebel等基督教村庄的居民运送物资。推文

text: Visioner PM Netanyahu on the ceasefire: There is a possibility for a real peace agreement with Lebanon tweet
text_zh: Visioner 内塔尼亚胡总理谈停火：与黎巴嫩达成真正和平协议的可能性是存在的 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF: The Artillery Corps carried out its first operational use of the new Ro’em (SIGMA 155) howitzer this week in southern Lebanon. The 282nd Regiment targeted Hezbollah rocket and anti tank positions, with the IDF saying the strikes were successful. The Ro’em offers higher fire rate, longer range, and improved mobility, and will gradually replace the aging M109. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军：炮兵部队本周在黎巴嫩南部首次实战使用了新型Ro’em (SIGMA 155) 榴弹炮。第282团瞄准了真主党的火箭弹和反坦克阵地，以色列国防军称打击非常成功。Ro’em提供了更高的射速、更远的射程和更好的机动性，并将逐步取代老旧的M109。推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu on the ceasefire: “We now have a historic opening for a peace deal with Lebanon. The balance has shifted, and we’re beginning to receive calls from Lebanon to engage in direct talks.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044836839261872545/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：内塔尼亚胡谈停火：“我们现在有了一个与黎巴嫩达成和平协议的历史性契机。力量平衡已经改变，我们开始收到来自黎巴嫩的直接谈判请求。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044836839261872545/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A Lebanese delivery driver says he keeps getting mistaken for IDF spokesman Avichay Adraee. "A woman opened the door and shouted 'Oh, Mary!'" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044836678880113035/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一名黎巴嫩送货司机说他总是被误认为是以色列国防军发言人阿维查伊·阿德雷。“一个女人打开门大喊‘哦，玛丽！’”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044836678880113035/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Senator Lindsey Graham: Like everyone, I yearn for peace in the Middle East. But we have to be smart. Hezbollah and peace don’t fit in the same sentence. Any ceasefire in Lebanon must include a credible path to disarm Hezbollah - one of the largest terrorist organizations in the world aligned with Iran that is dripping with American blood. If at the end of the day the severely degraded Iranian regime survives and receives sanctions relief, and Hezbollah is still left standing in Lebanon, it will only be a matter of time until both groups regenerate. No ceasefires or peace deals that create pathways that allow the reemergence of terrorist states like Iran or terrorist organizations like Hezbollah. We’ve accomplished too much to allow this to be the end state. I trust President Trump and his team, not only to find peace, but make it real and sustainable. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：参议员林赛·格雷厄姆：像所有人一样，我渴望中东和平。但我们必须聪明点。真主党和和平不能放在同一个句子里。黎巴嫩的任何停火都必须包括解除真主党武装的可信途径——这是世界上与伊朗结盟的最大的恐怖组织之一，手上沾满了美国人的鲜血。如果最终严重衰弱的伊朗政权得以幸存并获得制裁减免，而真主党仍然在黎巴嫩屹立不倒，那么这两个组织卷土重来只是时间问题。任何停火或和平协议都不能为伊朗这样的恐怖国家或真主党这样的恐怖组织创造复苏的途径。我们已经取得了太多的成就，不能让这成为最终状态。我相信特朗普总统及其团队，不仅能找到和平，还能使其变得真实且可持续。推文

text: 🇺🇸 The Pope wants Iran to have nuclear weapons, at least that's what Trump says. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 教皇希望伊朗拥有核武器，至少特朗普是这么说的。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: I will certainly visit Lebanon at the right time.
text_zh: 特朗普：我肯定会在适当的时候访问黎巴嫩。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that he and U.S. president trump remain committed in the campaign against Iran: ​"I have spoken with President Trump now during these two days, and he told me that he is tremendously determined to…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel will continue in its campaign to destroy Irans missile and enrichment threat towards Israel: "Of course, we will also deal with the missile threat and the enrichment capability—I will not elaborate. There are two very important moves here that can fundamentally change our security and diplomatic situation for years to come. With God's help we will do it, and with God's help, we will also succeed." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他和美国总统特朗普仍然致力于针对伊朗的行动：‘我这两天与特朗普总统进行了交谈，他告诉我，他非常坚定地……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列将继续其摧毁伊朗针对以色列的导弹和浓缩威胁的行动：“当然，我们也将处理导弹威胁和浓缩能力——我不会详述。这里有两个非常重要的举措，可以在未来几年从根本上改变我们的安全和外交局势。在上帝的帮助下，我们将做到这一点，在上帝的帮助下，我们也一定会成功。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 "It could be number 10 for me" - Trump on Israel-Lebanon talks. 🐻 Number 10 meaning, he'll add that to the list of wars he thinks he ended. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 “对我来说这可能是第10个”——特朗普谈以色列-黎巴嫩谈判。🐻 第10个意味着，他将把这加入到他认为自己结束的战争名单中。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: I am all about the gospel, I am about is as much as anybody can be.
text_zh: 特朗普：我全心全意支持福音，我和任何人一样支持它。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that the line is meant to protect Israeli settlements and communities from Hezbollah fire: "First of all, this allows us to block the danger of invasion into our communities; and secondly, it allows…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that he and U.S. president trump remain committed in the campaign against Iran: ​"I have spoken with President Trump now during these two days, and he told me that he is tremendously determined to continue the naval blockade as well, and also to bring about the dismantling of Iran's nuclear capability—what remains of it. He is not giving up on this; he is certain he can remove this threat once and for all." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，这条线旨在保护以色列定居点和社区免受真主党火力的攻击：‘首先，这使我们能够阻止入侵我们社区的危险；其次，它允许……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他和美国总统特朗普仍然致力于针对伊朗的行动：‘我这两天与特朗普总统进行了交谈，他告诉我，他非常坚定地继续海上封锁，并促成伊朗核能力的拆除——即剩下的部分。他没有放弃这一点；他确信他可以一劳永逸地消除这种威胁。’ @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Anger and embarrassment in Israel as Trump publicly declares a 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire beginning at 21 GMT Today’s Zionist media reaction frames Trump’s surprise announcement as yet another retreat against Iran and Hezbollah.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 特朗普公开宣布从格林威治标准时间今天21点开始为期10天的以色列-黎巴嫩停火，这在以色列引起了愤怒和尴尬。犹太复国主义媒体的反应将特朗普的突然宣布描述为在伊朗和真主党面前的又一次退缩。

text: Reporter: Why are you fighting with the pope? Trump: I have to do what's right. I have nothing against the pope. Reporter: Why are you fighting with him? Trump: I’m not fighting with him. The pope made a statement saying Iran can have a nuclear weapon. Reporter: He didn’t say that. Trump: I can disagree with the pope.
text_zh: 记者：你为什么要和教皇吵架？特朗普：我必须做正确的事。我对教皇没有任何意见。记者：你为什么要和他吵架？特朗普：我没有和他吵架。教皇发表声明说伊朗可以拥有核武器。记者：他没那么说。特朗普：我可以不同意教皇的观点。

text: 🇺🇸 Reporter: How much longer will Americans continue to see these high gas prices? Trump: Well, they are not very high. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 记者：美国人还要忍受多久的高油价？特朗普：嗯，它们并不算太高。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 "If there's no deal, fighting resumes." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “如果没有协议，战斗就会恢复。”——特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel would remain within Lebanon at the established ATGM line: "We remain in Lebanon in a thickened security strip. This is not the five points that existed before the roar of the mountains. …" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that the line is meant to protect Israeli settlements and communities from Hezbollah fire: "First of all, this allows us to block the danger of invasion into our communities; and secondly, it allows us to prevent direct anti-tank fire into the communities. The communities are now protected from these two dangers." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列将留在黎巴嫩既定的反坦克导弹（ATGM）防线内：‘我们留在黎巴嫩的一个加厚安全带内。这不是山脉轰鸣之前存在的五个点。……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，这条线旨在保护以色列定居点和社区免受真主党火力的攻击：“首先，这使我们能够阻止入侵我们社区的危险；其次，它使我们能够防止直接针对社区的反坦克火力。社区现在免受这两种危险的威胁。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 "Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon. If they did, every country, including Italy, where he's stationed, would be in trouble. The Pope has to understand." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “伊朗不能拥有核武器。如果他们拥有了，包括他驻扎的意大利在内的每个国家都会陷入麻烦。教皇必须明白这一点。”——特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: Iran has agreed to not have a nuclear weapon; they have agreed to it very powerfully. They have agreed to give us back the nuclear dust. We have a lot of agreement with Iran, and I think something is going to happen very positive.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗已同意不拥有核武器；他们非常有力地同意了这一点。他们同意归还我们的核尘埃。我们与伊朗达成了很多协议，我认为将会发生一些非常积极的事情。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 'The blockade is amazing, it’s holding up, very strong' — Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 “封锁非常棒，它正在持续，非常有力”——特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that he did not accept the ceasefire on Hezbollah's demands: "Hezbollah insisted on two conditions. Israel must withdraw from all of Lebanon's territory, up to the international border. A ceasefire…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel would remain within Lebanon at the established ATGM line: "We remain in Lebanon in a thickened security strip. This is not the five points that existed before the roar of the mountains. It is a security strip that starts at the sea and continues to Mount Dov and the entrances of Hermon to the Syrian border. A security strip 10 kilometers thick that is much stronger, much more continuous, and much more solid than what we had before." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他没有接受真主党提出的停火条件：‘真主党坚持两个条件。以色列必须从黎巴嫩所有领土撤出，直到国际边界。停火……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列将留在黎巴嫩既定的反坦克导弹（ATGM）防线内：“我们留在黎巴嫩的一个加厚安全带内。这不是山脉轰鸣之前存在的五个点。这是一个从海边开始，一直延伸到多夫山和黑门山入口，直到叙利亚边境的安全带。一个10公里厚的安全带，比我们以前拥有的更强大、更连续、更稳固。” @wfwitness

text: Reporter: How much longer will Americans continue to see these high gas prices? Trump: Well, they are not very high.
text_zh: 记者：美国人还要忍受多久的高油价？特朗普：嗯，它们并不算太高。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡ The US President Donald Trump: - Negotiations may take place over the weekend. - There is no 20 year limit, they will not have nuclear weapons. - If there is no deal the fighting will resume, there will be no extension of the ceasefire. - We have a lot of agreement with Iran and we think something might happen pretty soon. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡ 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：- 谈判可能会在周末进行。- 没有20年的限制，他们不会拥有核武器。- 如果没有协议，战斗将恢复，不会延长停火。- 我们与伊朗达成了很多协议，我们认为很快就会发生一些事情。🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel's two goals during these peace talks are the disarmament of Hezbollah and a sustainable peace: "For these peace talks, we have two fundamental requirements: One, the disarmament of Hezbollah.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that he did not accept the ceasefire on Hezbollah's demands: "Hezbollah insisted on two conditions. Israel must withdraw from all of Lebanon's territory, up to the international border. A ceasefire in the form of silence for silence. I did not agree to either this or that, and indeed these two conditions were not met." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列在这些和平谈判中的两个目标是解除真主党武装和实现可持续和平：‘对于这些和平谈判，我们有两个基本要求：第一，解除真主党武装……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他没有接受真主党提出的停火条件：“真主党坚持两个条件。以色列必须从黎巴嫩所有领土撤出，直到国际边界。以沉默换沉默的停火。我既不同意这一点，也不同意那一点，事实上这两个条件都没有得到满足。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: If there is no deal, the fighting will resume.
text_zh: 特朗普：如果没有协议，战斗就会恢复。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that he accepted U.S. President Trump’s request for a ceasefire to help advance talks: "I responded to this call and agreed to a timeout, or rather a temporary ceasefire of 10 days, to try to advance…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel's two goals during these peace talks are the disarmament of Hezbollah and a sustainable peace: "For these peace talks, we have two fundamental requirements: One, the disarmament of Hezbollah. Two, a sustainable peace agreement, peace based on strength." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他接受了美国总统特朗普的停火请求，以帮助推进谈判：‘我响应了这一呼吁，并同意暂停，或者说为期10天的临时停火，以试图推进……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列在这些和平谈判中的两个目标是解除真主党武装和实现可持续和平：“对于这些和平谈判，我们有两个基本要求：第一，解除真主党武装。第二，达成可持续的和平协议，基于实力的和平。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: There is no 20 year limit—they will not have nuclear weapons.
text_zh: 特朗普：没有20年的限制——他们不会拥有核武器。

text: 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 Zelensky wants Europe to send Ukrainians refugees to the front. "Our armed forces would like them to return, unconditionally. Unconditionally, because it's a matter of justice." Zelensky says many young Ukrainians left in violation of state legislation. The services of both countries should deal with this issue. The soldiers on the front need to be rotated. "Every person must bear responsibility who is a citizen of Ukraine, who has the strength for this — a constitutional duty and mobilization age." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 泽连斯基希望欧洲将乌克兰难民送回前线。“我们的武装部队希望他们无条件返回。无条件，因为这是一个正义问题。”泽连斯基说，许多年轻的乌克兰人违反国家法律离开了。两国部门应处理此问题。前线的士兵需要轮换。“每一个有能力的乌克兰公民都必须承担责任——这是宪法义务和动员年龄。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated: "Since October 7, we have fundamentally changed the balance of power in Lebanon. We activated the pagers, we eliminated the huge stockpile of 150,000 rockets and missiles that Nasrallah had prepared…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that he accepted U.S. President Trump’s request for a ceasefire to help advance talks: "I responded to this call and agreed to a timeout, or rather a temporary ceasefire of 10 days, to try to advance the agreement we started discussing with the ambassadors' meeting in Washington." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示：‘自10月7日以来，我们从根本上改变了黎巴嫩的力量平衡。我们启动了寻呼机，我们消除了纳斯鲁拉准备的15万枚火箭和导弹的巨大库存……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他接受了美国总统特朗普的停火请求，以帮助推进谈判：“我响应了这一呼吁，并同意暂停，或者说为期10天的临时停火，以试图推进我们在华盛顿大使会议上开始讨论的协议。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: The Lebanon ceasefire will include Hezbollah, I think Hezbollah will stick to the ceasefire.
text_zh: 特朗普：黎巴嫩停火将包括真主党，我认为真主党会遵守停火协议。

text: Trump: Iran wants to make a deal... they are willing to do things today they weren't willing to do 2 months ago.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗想要达成协议……他们今天愿意做的事情是两个月前他们不愿意做的。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated: "Since October 7, we have fundamentally changed the balance of power in Lebanon. We activated the pagers, we eliminated the huge stockpile of 150,000 rockets and missiles that Nasrallah had prepared to destroy the cities of Israel. We eliminated Nasrallah, and this balance changed in such a way that we started receiving calls from Lebanon in the last month to hold peace talks directly between us, which had not happened in over 40 years." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示：“自10月7日以来，我们从根本上改变了黎巴嫩的力量平衡。我们启动了寻呼机，消除了纳斯鲁拉为摧毁以色列城市而准备的15万枚火箭弹和导弹的巨大库存。我们消除了纳斯鲁拉，这种平衡发生了变化，以至于我们在过去一个月里开始接到来自黎巴嫩的电话，要求在我们之间直接进行和平谈判，这在过去40多年里从未发生过。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: The Pope has to understand: Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon.
text_zh: 特朗普：教皇必须明白：伊朗不能拥有核武器。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The IDF announced that it has used the new “Ro’em” automatic howitzer in combat for the first time, allegedly striking Hezbollah rocket and anti‑tank missile launchers in southern Lebanon. The truck‑mounted system requires only three crew members (down from eight), reduces response time to under one minute, and offers longer range, higher rate of fire, and simultaneous‑impact capability. The IDF described the operational debut as a historic milestone after 50 years of artillery modernisation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布首次在战斗中使用新型“Ro’em”自动榴弹炮，据称打击了黎巴嫩南部的真主党火箭弹和反坦克导弹发射器。这种卡车搭载的系统仅需三名机组人员（此前为八名），将响应时间缩短至一分钟以内，并提供更远的射程、更高的射速和同时打击能力。以色列国防军将此次作战首秀描述为50年火炮现代化后的一个历史性里程碑。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The US Navy amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli seen today south west of the Gulf of Oman. 21.18N 60.93E @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国海军两栖攻击舰“的黎波里”号今天出现在阿曼湾西南部。北纬21.18度，东经60.93度 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 i24NEWS: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun told U.S. officials, including Secretary of State Marco Rubio, that a phone call between leaders is only meaningful when there is significant progress on the ground. “Without real negotiations, and especially without a ceasefire, I will not hold a call with Netanyahu at this time,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 i24NEWS：黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩告诉包括国务卿马尔科·卢比奥在内的美国官员，只有在地面取得重大进展时，领导人之间的通话才有意义。“如果没有真正的谈判，特别是没有停火，我目前不会与内塔尼亚胡通话，”他说。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 Kan: The Israel‑Lebanon ceasefire will take effect at midnight. Trump pressured Netanyahu for an immediate truce; in return, Netanyahu insisted that Israeli ground forces remain in the new security zone in southern Lebanon. It is expected to last…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Hezbollah MP Ibrahim al‑Moussawi called the ceasefire an achievement for Lebanon, citing the group’s “legendary steadfastness” and Iran’s “supreme efforts”. Bloc head Ali Fayyad warned that continued Israeli strikes or targeted killings in southern Lebanon would be serious violations, and that any IDF presence on Lebanese land is aggression giving the right to resist. He demanded full withdrawal, an end to strikes, and the return of displaced residents, and warned that direct talks with Israel could lead to “internal collision”. Lebanese Parliamentary Speaker Nabih Berri urged displaced residents not to rush back until the ceasefire’s status is clear. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 Kan：以色列与黎巴嫩的停火协议将于午夜生效。特朗普向内塔尼亚胡施压要求立即休战；作为交换，内塔尼亚胡坚持要求以色列地面部队留在黎巴嫩南部的新安全区。预计将持续……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 真主党议员易卜拉欣·穆萨维称停火是黎巴嫩的成就，并援引该组织的“传奇坚定性”和伊朗的“最高努力”。议会集团负责人阿里·法亚德警告称，以色列在黎巴嫩南部的持续打击或定点清除将是严重违规行为，任何以色列国防军在黎巴嫩土地上的存在都是赋予抵抗权利的侵略行为。他要求全面撤军、停止打击并让流离失所的居民返回，并警告称与以色列的直接谈判可能导致“内部冲突”。黎巴嫩议会议长纳比·贝里敦促流离失所的居民在停火状态明确之前不要急于返回。 @wfwitness

text: 🇾🇪 🇾🇪 "The tyranny of Trump, who is a puppet in the hands of Zionism, has reached an extremely bad level. Sayyed Abdul-Malik al-Houthi: Netanyahu says the American administration provides him with reports of its work. Behind that is the Zionist lobby. Trump, and the entire system in America, is completely subject to the Jewish Zionist lobby. "This situation threatens the security and stability of the region, with its impacts at the global level." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇾🇪 🇾🇪 “特朗普作为犹太复国主义手中的傀儡，其暴政已经达到了极其恶劣的程度。赛义德·阿卜杜勒-马利克·胡塞：内塔尼亚胡说美国政府向他提供其工作报告。其背后是犹太复国主义游说团体。特朗普以及整个美国体系完全受制于犹太复国主义游说团体。这种情况威胁着该地区的安全与稳定，并对全球层面产生影响。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese media report that over 60 southern Lebanon towns came under dozens of Israeli airstrikes and artillery fire in the past 4 hours. An Israeli airstrike hit a building in Ghaziyeh, as Lebanese media reported additional IDF strikes across several areas of southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044831527670788602/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：黎巴嫩媒体报道称，过去4小时内，黎巴嫩南部60多个城镇遭到数十次以色列空袭和炮火袭击。以色列空袭了加齐耶（Ghaziyeh）的一栋建筑，黎巴嫩媒体报道称以色列国防军在黎巴嫩南部多个地区进行了更多打击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044831527670788602/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @alexplitsas : 🧵 🚨 Africa Problem Just returned from a trip to Africa where I was able to witness the success of USAFRICOM efforts to train and integrate the competing factions that is part of a roadmap for security and stability necessary to enable foreign direct investment and free elections tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @alexplitsas：🧵 🚨 非洲问题 刚从非洲旅行回来，我亲眼见证了美国非洲司令部（USAFRICOM）在培训和整合相互竞争的派系方面取得的成功，这是实现安全与稳定路线图的一部分，而这对于实现外国直接投资和自由选举是必要的。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 U.S. pressure on Israel in an effort to secure a deal with Iran has reportedly produced results, with Donald Trump announcing that Israel and Lebanon have reached a 10-day ceasefire. 🔹 While Lebanon’s role may seem unexpected, the context is key: Iran had conditioned progress in talks with the U.S. on a ceasefire in Lebanon — specifically a halt to Israeli strikes on Hezbollah. Since Israel cannot formally negotiate with Hezbollah, talks were conducted indirectly through U.S. mediation with Lebanon, resulting in the temporary ceasefire. 🔹 Israeli media report that government ministers were frustrated, as Trump announced the ceasefire before it was formally discussed by Israel’s cabinet. 🔹 Meanwhile, Pakistan’s army chief, who has played an active mediating role in U.S.–Iran talks, traveled from Tehran to Washington following recent discussions, where further details of a potential agreement are expected to be addressed. 🔹 It appears Trump is pushing hard to reach a deal with Iran, potentially ahead of an upcoming visit to China, even applying pressure on Israel to do so. 🔹 The current interim ceasefire deadline with Iran expires on April 22, and several major outlets suggest it may be extended for a few more weeks. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 据报道，美国为确保与伊朗达成协议而对以色列施加的压力已产生结果，唐纳德·特朗普宣布以色列和黎巴嫩已达成10天停火协议。🔹 虽然黎巴嫩的角色看起来出人意料，但背景是关键：伊朗将与美国谈判的进展以黎巴嫩停火为条件——具体来说是停止以色列对真主党的打击。由于以色列无法与真主党正式谈判，谈判是通过美国调解黎巴嫩间接进行的，从而达成了临时停火。🔹 以色列媒体报道称，政府部长们感到沮丧，因为特朗普在以色列内阁正式讨论之前就宣布了停火。🔹 与此同时，在美伊谈判中发挥积极调解作用的巴基斯坦陆军参谋长在最近的讨论后从德黑兰前往华盛顿，预计将在那里处理潜在协议的更多细节。🔹 看来特朗普正在努力与伊朗达成协议，可能是在即将访问中国之前，甚至为此向以色列施压。🔹 目前与伊朗的临时停火截止日期为4月22日，几家主要媒体建议可能会再延长几周。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: WarMonitor The Israeli security cabinet did not approve the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire before Trump announced it. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044833534368444711/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 以色列安全内阁在特朗普宣布之前并未批准以黎停火协议。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044833534368444711/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel CRAZY FOOTAGE 🔴 REPORT FROM LEBANON: This Hezbollah fighter reportedly received a warning. It is possible the IDF contacted him to inform him he was a target and about to be struck. He exited the car to avoid endangering others, ran into a field, and positioned himself so the drone would hit him alone. In many cases, the IDF has called targets to leave areas with civilians. They leave to an area alone, then drone targets them. This has been reported for multiple cases. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：疯狂的画面 🔴 来自黎巴嫩的报道：据报道，这名真主党战士收到了一条警告。以色列国防军可能联系了他，通知他他是一个目标，即将被打击。他为了避免危及他人而下车，跑进田野，并调整位置，以便无人机只击中他一人。在许多情况下，以色列国防军曾呼吁目标离开平民区。他们离开到一个单独的区域，然后无人机瞄准他们。这在多个案例中都有报道。推文
